name: Kishorè Shanto
description: A highly motivated and energetic computer science student with a strong academic foundation and a passion for research and innovation. Seeking a challenging internship or entry-level role in the tech industry where I can leverage my skills and knowledge, including my research experience and publications, to contribute to cutting-edge solutions. Eager to learn from experienced professionals and contribute to a dynamic and collaborative team environment while continuing to pursue my research interests.
request_do_not_disturb_message: I am currently busy with my research work. Please do not reach me at social media unless it's urgent. Thank you for understanding.
